mapper.select:
select post_id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, create_by, create_time, remark from sys_post
AND post_code like concat('%', #{postCode}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND post_name like concat('%', #{postName}, '%')
select post_id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, create_by, create_time, remark from sys_post
select post_id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, create_by, create_time, remark where post_id = #{postId}
select p.post_id from sys_post p left join sys_user_post up on up.post_id = p.post_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = up.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId}
select p.post_id, p.post_name, p.post_code from sys_post p left join sys_user_post up on up.post_id = p.post_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = up.user_id where u.user_name = #{userName}
select post_id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, create_by, create_time, remark where post_name=#{postName} limit 1
select post_id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, create_by, create_time, remark where post_code=#{postCode} limit 1
